text:
Fix: 

I assume that the vendor changed something in the file without
bumping the version but I'm not sure since I'm just beginning to use
the port.  I assume the maintainer of this port is a little more
knowledgable than I.  Anyway, here is the new md5sum I get from the
xephem binary.

MD5 (xephem-3.4.tar.gz) = 9ec29999d081caabbf21cba941734c6c
How-To-Repeat: 
Try to install astro/xephem
